---
name: Proposal
about: Propose a change to ZAKAI behavior or model
title: "[Proposal] "
labels: proposal
---

## Summary

Describe the change in one or two sentences.

---

## Invariant Impact (required)

- [ ] Changes capability_definition_hash semantics
- [ ] Changes absent vs present behavior at the membrane
- [ ] Adds meaning or fields to capability_snapshot beyond (capability, version, pins)
- [ ] Modifies canonicalization without bumping `v`

If ANY box is checked, this is a protocol-level change. Explain explicitly:

---

## Proposed Change

What exactly changes? Be precise.

---

## Why

What problem does this solve?

---

## Alternatives Considered

Why not keep the current model?

---

## Risks

What invariants or guarantees are weakened or redefined?

---

## Notes

Anything else reviewers should know.
